# Folder Integrity Monitoring Script Installation
# Generated by Deception Based Defense Platform

# Run once as Administrator:
#   powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\deploy.ps1
# Place watcher.ps1 in the same folder as deploy.ps1
#
# Installation Path By default script is hidden:
#	"C:\watcher\"
# Installed as <tokenId>.ps1	
#
# Uninstall:
# 	attrib -h -s “c:\watcher\*”
#	del c:\watcher\*
